case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION; $800.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE OF MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY. OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-22-2012 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 22, 2012 AT 9AM PER THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR #11604
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE OF CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY ZAKIA ROMNEY FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

NOTICE OF MOTION AN DMOTON TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION; $800.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-25-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-22-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ZAKIA ROMNEY. TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 AM ON THE LAW AND MOTIONS CALENDAR LINE 21. NILS ROSENQUEST JUDGE PRO TEM, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT ZAKIA ROMNEY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
